texto: ...so much has been laid on the sunset—heavy-handed metaphors, sentimental music. Everyone’s always walking into them, and that is some very intense light. Maybe that’s where the term “love is blind” comes from, because so many people are walking into sunsets, burning out their corneas.
explicacao: Citação de Kirk Farber sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “...so much has been laid on the sunset—heavy-handed metaphors, sentimental music. Everyone’s alwa…” articula reflexao, funny, walking em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: ...so much has been laid on the sunset—heavy-handed metaphors, sentimental music. Everyone’s always walking into them, and that is some very intense light. Maybe that’s where the term “love is blind” comes from, because so many people are walking into sunsets, burning out their corneas.
